case_title: XIANG CHEN VS. DA ZHAO LIU

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, XIANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, DA ZHAO AN INDIVIDUAL DBA FISHMAN VILLAGE $8,027.87 PRINCIPAL, $67.80 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,295.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
